name: Lancelot

passive.name: Soul Cutter
passive.description: Each time Lancelot charges, his damage is increased by 7.5% for 4s, up to 30%.
passive.tips: While engaging Solo or with the teammates.First Hit the second ability to make damage then the first ability to make some combos and to distract the enemy, then finish him with the Ultimate if he still alive then hit the second ability again.

skill1.name: Puncture
skill1.description:
Lancelot charges in the direction, dealing 150 (+50% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies along the way and applying a Sword Mark to the first unmarked enemy hit. The Sword Mark lasts 3s.
If Lancelot successfully applies a Sword Mark to an enemy, the skill's cooldown will be reset.
skill1.tips: In Combat make sure you hit the target so you can use it twice, Maybe 3 time's Combo if you killed the target what ever it was, Works On Enemies & Minions aswell

skill2.name: Thorned Rose
skill2.description: Lancelot strikes in the target direction 3 times, each time dealing 220 (+120% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies hit (damage is reduced when multiple enemies are hit). He's untargetable during this process. Enemies in the center of the area take all the 3 hits and are slowed by 20% for 0.5s. The slow effect can stack.
skill2.tips: Throned Rose is the Best Ability for Lancelot in dealing damage to the nearby enemies if positioned well , and While the team is Engaging you Better turn your focusing mode on and try to position it very well in the centre of the fight area, you go use it first then you hit the Ulti real quick .. We will get to that ''Ultimate''part in less than a minute, Also We can use Throned Rose to farm minion's real quick and the Jungle monster's in earlier game it's very Powerfull especially when we buy the ''Hunter's knife'' to increase the damage to the jungle monsters ,so there is No need to use.

ultimate.name: Phantom Execution
ultimate.description: After a short delay, Lancelot performs an executioner's strike in the target direction, dealing 350 (+170% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies hit. He is invincible throughout the process.
ultimate.tips: Has a very short stun but could be quite effective with proper timing -Has Immunity while skill is charging, can be a great counter attack! -Can also be used be used for escaping, engaging enemies.

mechanicNote: Lancelot adalah assassin dengan kemampuan burst damage dan mobilitas tinggi untuk mengeliminasi target prioritas.
